programmes.show_description: More hopeful singletons visit the First Dates restaurant. Will vet Simon see past lawyer Arunima's wheelchair? And can Londoners Suzie and Gareth find that certain spark?
Singleton Nicole's friends call her Bridget Jones. At first glance, chartered surveyor Gary is no Mr Darcy, but will his karaoke skills impress Nicole?
Brand new series: Vicky and her husband Ercan face a big decision; should they start a family? Vicky gives motherhood a trial run and sees how her frozen embryos are getting on. (Ep1/2)
Brand new series: Vicky and Ercan meet a mum who had her children through surrogacy and an adoptive mum. But are they any closer to deciding whether parenthood is right for them? (Ep2/2)
The Prescott: Alex's new company puts her up at a luxury apartment with full amenities and famous neighbours - and the family are keen to make the most of it...
Legacy: Phil visits his dad to make sure he's OK after hearing some concerning news. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch a bunch of their old childhood memorabilia.
Oates & Oates: When Ren decides to host an Earth Day telethon, Barry vows to help her book some A-listers. Beverly and her nemesis square off to find Bill a match.
The Fake-Up: As things get more serious between Adam and Brea, Beverly struggles to let go. Barry is thrown when Lainey Lewis comes back to town for a visit.
Can Warren trust Jenson? Diane makes a decision. Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. And Donny proposes to Misbah, but it's not long before their bubble bursts...
(2018) Feel-good British family comedy. Sarah's (Beattie Edmondson) chaotic life gets even more complicated when she inherits a naughty pug from her nan.
The Olde Stone Mill: Gordon Ramsay visits The Olde Stone Mill in Tuckahoe, New York. The restaurant has been restored, but owner Dean can't get customers through the door.
Giuseppi's: Gordon Ramsay visits a family-owned Italian in Michigan, run by a father and son who constantly clash. Can he get the restaurant - and the family - back on track?
Handlebar: Gordon Ramsay takes on a time warp at the Handlebar restaurant and lounge in Mount Sinai, New York, where the owners are stuck in the 80s with an unenthusiastic chef.
Brand new series: The two new couples go on honeymoon, where there's an unlikely third wheel and frank confessions, and a groom's views infuriate his new wife.
Brand new series: Three new couples prepare for their first dinner party. But after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming.
This Little Wiggy: Bart is invited to the Wiggum household and finds it filled with police equipment: a troublemaker's paradise.
Simpson Tide: Homer, Barney and Moe become trapped in a nuclear submarine in a combat situation. Then Homer accidentally ejects the captain (guest star Rod Steiger).
The Joy of Sect: The family join a cult that brainwashes its disciples into believing they will be taken to the planet Blisstonia, but Marge escapes and plans a rescue.
Das Bus: Bart, Lisa and their classmates fight to survive when they get stranded on a remote island after Otto drives the school bus off a bridge and into the sea.
The Last Temptation of Krust: Krusty swaps his old routines for edgier material and becomes the hottest comic in showbusiness. But then he faces a dilemma.
Dumbbell Indemnity: Moe meets a new woman (guest star Helen Hunt) but maxes out his credit card trying to impress her. So he reverts to insurance fraud. With help from Homer...
Lisa the Simpson: Lisa starts to suspect that she's not as clever as she used to be and worries that she'll end up a permanent underachiever like her father.
Brand new series: In the Malaysian island paradise of Langkawi, the celebs brave a bat cave, and a fruit basket leaves a bitter taste. But will a wrong turn seal one team's fate?
Boyz N the Highlands: Bart, Nelson, Dolph and secret bad boy Martin Prince go on a court-mandated wilderness trek as a punishment.
You Won't Believe What This Episode Is About - Act Three Will Shock You!: Homer goes viral after accidentally locking Santa's Little Helper in the car.
(2022) Danger-zone action as Tom Cruise returns to the cockpit after 36 years. He's Maverick. He still feels the need for speed. And there's a near-impossible mission to fly. With Jon Hamm.
Edinburgh musician Jamie is tired of groupies and flings, and is looking for a deeper connection. Jasmin from Bognor Regis has ME and needs acceptance from a new lover.
This bumper extended edition includes: Planet Earth III, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, First Dates, Coronation Street and HELP! My House Is Haunted.
Will hairdresser Lauren fall for party boy Danny's perma-tan chutzpah, or will his Dutch courage put her off? And Paolo returns; can Mario handle his high-heeled alter-ego?
The Goggleboxers watch The Gentlemen, Casualty, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Crufts, Queens, and Martin Compston's Norwegian Fling.
Can Warren trust Jenson? Diane makes a decision. Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. And Donny proposes to Misbah, but it's not long before their bubble bursts...
With things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but it's not long before their bubble bursts... Elsewhere, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home, and a relationship is on the rocks.
Froggy supports his grandson. Donny visits a former flame. And a mother is horrified by what she overhears...
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
Café Hon: The Café Hon restaurant in Baltimore is struggling because its owner has alienated the local community. Can Gordon help?
Pretty in Pink: With prom night looming, Adam worries that Brea will ditch him for a more popular guy. Erica struggles to support Geoff when he gets some bad news.
Airplane!: Beverly announces a family trip to Miami, but Erica suspects that she's scheming. Murray grapples with his fear of flying. Geoff tries to keep the peace.
The Kiss: In honour of her late grandmother, Gloria decides to cook traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. And Claire becomes overbearing.
Earthquake: An earthquake traps Claire in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny has an existential crisis while he's out with Jay.
Brand new series: Three new couples prepare for their first dinner party. But after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming.
Farmer Chris brings a beetroot to his first date. Two dog fans commiserate over past loves. And football coach Timi flirts up a storm - but will student Afope flirt back?
Chiarella's: Gordon Ramsay visits South Philadelphia, where struggling family-run restaurant Chiarella's is pushing owners Tommy and Dina DeFino's marriage to the brink.
Homer Goes to Prep School: Homer joins an off-the-grid survivalist group who have a top-secret doomsday bunker.
A Test Before Trying: When the school's threatened with closure because of low test scores, its fate rests with one student who missed the exam: Bart.
Our Children, Ourselves: Claire and Phil want Alex to relax about her studies, but then question their own intellectual drives. And Gloria tries to befriend another nice couple.
Caught in the Act: The kids catch Phil and Claire in a compromising position when they surprise them with breakfast in bed on their anniversary.
Brand new series: Three new couples prepare for their first dinner party. But after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming.

programmes.show_name: New: Dance Moms: A New Era
programmes.show_description: Brand new series - Something Borrowed, Something Flu: Flu has wiped out half of the team. And then Glo makes a call that alienates all of the moms and her own daughter.
The Saga of Carl: Homer, Moe, Lenny and Carl win the lottery, but Carl runs off to Iceland with the winnings.
Dangers on a Train: While she's browsing for wedding anniversary cakes, Marge stumbles across a website for married people who want to have affairs.
It's a family's worst nightmare when two children are taken... Elsewhere, Charlie shares some good news with Vicky.
...Australia - Brand new series: It's the third Commitment Ceremony. But with dinner party tensions still simmering, emotions erupt cataclysmically as two marriages end.
Brand new series: Kit wants answers from Inga and Jazz. A revelation derails a double date. Jules and Philip's sibling rivalry revs up. And can Angus win back Jack's friendship?
The Goggleboxers watch The Gentlemen, Casualty, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Crufts, Queens, and Martin Compston's Norwegian Fling.
Will hairdresser Lauren fall for party boy Danny's perma-tan chutzpah, or will his Dutch courage put her off? And Paolo returns; can Mario handle his high-heeled alter-ego?
